modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Student can't use Adobe Creative Cloud on lab computer.

full_description_text: Student try to use Adobe Creative Cloud. But it say, "Sorry, your account is not valid on this device." This happen on lab computer. They need help to fix this problem.
short_description: Student can't use Adobe Creative Cloud on lab computer.
description: Student try to use Adobe Creative Cloud. But it say, "Sorry, your account is not valid on this device." This happen on lab computer. They need help to fix this problem.
